channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: Anime News Network Japanese Animation TV Ranking, June 29-July 5
item.description: Jaadugar: A Witch in Mongolia debuts at #7; Draw This, Then Die! debuts at #10 ― A marathon re-airing of the sixth season of the Solitary Gourmet live-action series aired on TV Tokyo on Wednesday,... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Japanese Animation TV Ranking, June 29-July 5

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network 动画 Expo Sets 新作 Record 422,000 Turnstile Attendees
item.description: Next year's event to be held on July 2-5 ― The Society for the Promotion of Japanese Animation (SPJA), the organizer of Anime Expo, announced on Friday that this year's four-day event had a record... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Anime Expo Sets New Record of 422,000 Turnstile Attendees

item.title: [动画][CAST][STAFF][公开] Anime News Network Crunchyroll 公开 声优阵容, 制作阵容 Same-Day English Dub Hanaori-san Still Wants Fight Next Life 动画
item.description: Kelly Greenshield, Mauricio Ortiz-Segura star in dub debuting on Saturday ― Crunchyroll revealed on Friday it will stream a same-day English dub for the television anime of Hekiru Hikawa's... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Crunchyroll Reveals Cast, Staff for Same-Day English Dub of Hanaori-san Still Wants to Fight in the Next Life Anime

item.title: [动画][CAST][发表] MyAnimeList 新作 Ghost Shell TV 动画 宣布 Main 声优阵容
item.description: The official website for the new Koukaku Kidoutai (The Ghost in the Shell) television anime announced the main cast on Tuesday. The new TV anime premiered on Tuesday at 11:00 p.m. on Kansai TV and... | 来源: MAL | 原文: New 'Ghost in the Shell' TV Anime Announces Main Cast

item.title: [动画] MyAnimeList Mononoke Gets 新作 动画 Project
